extensionDescription.message: Speed up ChatGPT and improve long conversation experience.

safeModeDesc.message: Hide old messages visually. Fast to restore, lowest risk.

performanceModeDesc.message: Store old messages locally, remove them from DOM, expandable.

removeModeDesc.message: Discard old page nodes for the strongest reduction. Restore by refresh.

safeModeSelected.message: Safe mode selected: old messages stay in the page and are hidden visually.

performanceModeSelected.message: Performance mode selected: old messages are saved locally and removed from the DOM.

removeModeSelected.message: Maximum Performance selected: old messages are discarded from the current page display.

roundStatsBadge.description: Popup badge showing visible and total rounds

domReductionLabel.description: Metric label for estimated DOM reduction

errorKeepRoundsRange.description: Error message for invalid keep rounds range

errorNotChatGPT.message: Please use this feature on a ChatGPT page
errorNotChatGPT.description: Error message when not on ChatGPT page

errorScriptLoad.message: Unable to load extension script, please refresh the page and try again
errorScriptLoad.description: Error message when script fails to load

errorOperationFailed.message: Operation failed: Please refresh the page and try again

errorOperationFailedRetry.message: Operation failed, please refresh the page and try again
errorOperationFailedRetry.description: Error message for failed operation with retry

errorNotFound.message: No conversation messages found, please ensure you are on a ChatGPT conversation page
errorNotFound.description: Error message when no messages found

infoNoNeedClean.message: Current conversation has only $ROUNDS$ rounds, no need to optimize
infoNoNeedClean.description: Info message when no need to clean

successCleanedDetailed.message: Removed $REMOVED$ old rounds, kept the last $KEPT$ rounds
successCleanedDetailed.description: Success message with detailed cleaning info

successCollapsedDetailed.message: Hidden $HIDDEN$ old rounds, kept the latest $KEPT$ rounds visible
successCollapsedDetailed.description: Success message with detailed safe collapse info

successPerformanceDetailed.message: Moved $HIDDEN$ old rounds out of the DOM, kept the latest $KEPT$ rounds visible
successPerformanceDetailed.description: Success message with detailed performance collapse info

errorCleanFailed.description: Error message prefix for clean failure

autoMaintainEnabled.description: Status message when auto-maintain is enabled

autoMaintainDisabled.description: Status message when auto-maintain is disabled

hiddenOlderMessages.description: Placeholder shown where old messages were hidden

performanceHiddenOlderMessages.message: Older messages stored locally and removed from DOM ($ROUNDS$ rounds)
performanceHiddenOlderMessages.description: Placeholder shown where old messages were detached

removedOlderMessages.message: Older messages optimized for maximum performance ($ROUNDS$ rounds)
removedOlderMessages.description: Placeholder shown where old messages were removed

turnOffAutoMaintainToExpand.description: Hint shown when auto-maintain disables placeholder expansion

snapshotRestoreFailed.message: Unable to restore saved messages. Refresh the page to reload the full conversation.

domWarningTitle.message: ChatGPT page structure may have changed - extension cannot detect conversations
domWarningTitle.description: Icon tooltip when DOM structure change is detected

domWarningMessage.message: ChatGPT page structure may have changed. Extension is temporarily unable to work. Please contact the developer.
domWarningMessage.description: Warning shown in popup when DOM structure change is detected

badgeTitle.description: Tooltip for the extension icon badge

snapshotStorageDesc.message: Performance mode stores hidden messages locally in this browser only. These snapshots never leave your device.

snapshotStatsText.message: Saved conversations: $CONVERSATIONS$ | Saved rounds: $ROUNDS$ | Saved turns: $TURNS$

snapshotTtlRangeError.message: Snapshot retention must be between 1 and 365 days.

clearSnapshotsConfirm.message: Clear all local Performance mode snapshots? This cannot be undone.

snapshotTestDesc.message: Inspect locally saved Performance mode snapshots by conversation ID.
